title: RailsJournalEntry
description: One entry in the ambient observer's journal of rail motion. Source: GET /api/missioncontrol/rails/journal (holdspeak/rails_observer.py, Phase 88). Each entry is a note tagged rails-journal; the observer is read-only and off by default.

body_markdown.description: the events named (receipts) + the local model's summary

created_at.description: instant; may be empty when the note store omits it
